title: Samsung India Electronics is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Samsung India Electronics is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
